productDisplayName: Nike Men's Basic Woven Med Black Short
description: CompositionBlack shorts made of 100% nylon with a 100% polyester lining, elasticated waist with an inner drawstring, pockets on the sides and one at the back, grey stripe running along the length of the shorts with a blue piping and embroidered nike swoosh on the left leg above the hemFittingComfortWash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Remove immediately Do not bleach Tumble dry low Cool iron Do not dry clean Stylish to the T, these nylon shorts from nike are designed to keep you fresh and comfortable while you make the most of your exrecise regime. The inner polyester lining in mesh provides dry comfort. The broad waistband sits snugly, while you can further customise the Fit by using the drawstring on the inside. Team it with Nike Sports tees and shoes for that smart, sporty look.
